name: @platform/security-auth
description: Authentication abstraction: token validation, identity contracts, RBAC primitives, and auth provider interface.

readme.summary: DEPRECATED (ADR-0006 / ADR-ACT-0288): superseded by authorisation-runtime + adapters-keycloak; do not add new usage; removal review 2026-12-18. Authentication abstraction: token validation, identity contracts, RBAC primitives, and auth provider interface.
responsibilities: Define the auth provider interface that concrete adapters (e.g. adapters-keycloak) must implement
Expose typed identity and claims contracts for use across platform packages
Provide RBAC primitives (role checks, permission assertions) used by API middleware
Validate tokens and extract claims without coupling to a specific IdP
nonResponsibilities: Does not implement a specific identity provider protocol (owned by adapters-keycloak)
Does not store user data or manage user profiles (domain-core)
usage: Do not add new consumers — this package is deprecated (ADR-0006), retained only until its removal review 2026-12-18.
operationalNotes: The auth provider interface decouples platform from IdP ? swapping providers requires only a new adapter
RBAC primitives are additive ? claims are enriched, never narrowed, at this layer
